modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CURRENT STATE — risk score 13 (NORMAL), all PRs CI-green, no conflicts, CI regression #723 functionally resolved.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: New high-severity security issue without PR, main CI failure rate >20%, merge conflict rate >25%, or confirmed CI regression on active PRs.
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: New security regression on main, main CI failure rate >30%, or 2+ unresolved critical issues without PRs.
